overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed open world game showing a character in a hat and coat walking through a mountainous wilderness. The character descends a grassy hillside with panoramic mountain views, moves through pine forests, and encounters wildlife near a dirt path on a bright sunny day.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain meadow with panoramic views

agents.ego_description: walking steadily downhill through tall grass with panoramic mountain views ahead

entered.detail: snow-capped mountain peaks visible in the distance against blue sky
scattered coniferous trees dotting the hillside
steep slope covered in tall green grass and wildflowers
large grey rocks scattered across the grass

segments.scene_description: The character descends an open grassy hillside with expansive views of distant mountain ranges. Sparse pine trees dot the landscape while the camera follows from behind, capturing the bright sunlight and scattered boulders on the terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested hillside with dense coniferous cover

events.description: moving from open meadow into denser tree cover with taller pines surrounding the path

agents.ego_description: continuing downhill through thicker vegetation with trees closing in on both sides

entered.detail: thick bushes and low vegetation lining the descent path
forested valley becoming visible through the trees ahead

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a denser section of forest where tall pine trees create partial shade overhead. The vegetation becomes thicker with underbrush lining the path, and views open up toward a distant valley below.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy clearing with dirt path and wildlife

events.description: encountering a pack of coyotes grazing near the dirt path ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching a dirt path and startling a pack of coyotes, causing them to scatter and run

notable_agents.action: pack of coyotes grazing near the path before scattering and running away from the approaching character

entered.detail: worn dirt trail cutting through the grass, leading toward the valley
cliff face and rocky terrain visible on the right side

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a clearing and approaches a dirt path where a pack of coyotes is grazing. The animals scatter and flee as the character approaches, and the terrain flattens out near the path with large rocks and distant cliff faces visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from an open, sun-drenched mountain slope into a dense pine forest before emerging onto a flat wilderness path. It begins by following the character down a grassy hillside, where the bright sunlight illuminates scattered boulders and expansive views of distant mountain ranges. As the character moves forward, the landscape shifts into a denser forest where tall pine trees cast partial shade and thick underbrush lines the way, occasionally revealing glimpses of a valley below. The scene then opens into a wide clearing as the character approaches a dirt path, causing a pack of grazing coyotes to scatter and flee. Finally, the terrain flattens out completely, leaving the character on the open path surrounded by large rocks and towering cliff faces.
